channel.title: LLM Timeline — LG Models
channel.description: Large Language Model releases from LG.

item.title: K-EXAONE (LG)
item.description: Parameters: K-EXAONE License: open Type: model 236BA23B. “EXAONE”=“EXpert AI for EveryONE”.

item.title: EXAONE 4.0 (LG)
item.description: Parameters: EXAONE 4.0 License: open Type: model “EXAONE”=“EXpert AI for EveryONE”. Training tokens/ratio: EXAONE-3 7.8B=8T tokens (Aug/2024) -> EXAONE-3.5 7.8B=9T -> EXAONE-3.5 32B=6.5T tokens -> EXAONE 4.0 32B=14T tokens. MMLU score is MMLU-Redux. Interesting: "To focus [RL] training on more informative data samples, we perform accuracy-based filtering by generating eight responses from the SFT model and excluding samples where all eight responses are correct, a pre-filtering step that removes problems that are easy for the model to avoid inefficient training."

item.title: EXAONE Deep (LG)
item.description: Parameters: EXAONE Deep License: open Type: model “EXAONE”=“EXpert AI for EveryONE”. Training tokens/ratio dropped from EXAONE-3 7.8B with 8T (Aug/2024) to 3.5 (Dec/2024) 7.8B with 9T to 32B (also Deep) with 6.5T. Announce: https://www.lgresearch.ai/news/view?seq=543

item.title: EXAONE-3.5 (LG)
item.description: Parameters: EXAONE-3.5 License: open Type: model “EXAONE”=“EXpert AI for EveryONE”. Training tokens/ratio dropped from EXAONE-3 7.8B with 8T (Aug/2024) to this (Dec/2024) 7.8B with 9T to 32B with 6.5T.

item.title: EXAONE 3.0 (LG)
item.description: Parameters: EXAONE 3.0 License: open Type: model “EXAONE”=“EXpert AI for EveryONE”

item.title: EXAONE 1.0 (LG)
item.description: Parameters: 300B License: closed Type: model AI model by LG
